category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dtrx as intelligent archive extraction.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides dtrx; PyPI project page uses dtrx as the project name.
docs_sources: Official PyPI project links point to the dtrx-py/dtrx repository; its README is the official documentation surface for the maintained Python 3 package.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official PyPI project page lists the repository link as https://github.com/dtrx-py/dtrx.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says intelligent archive extraction; official PyPI page describes dtrx as a script to intelligently extract multiple archive types.
